text:
Once upon a time in bustling Blossom town there lived an owl. People seldom saw him because they always thought he'd owlowl. But he loved observing their lives.

His favorite spot was the bake shop. There old Mrs. Plum wouldnsensor. She never spoke much. But oh how she knew cookies.

One sunny weekend she decided to bake chocolate brownies. Just my thing.

She poured cocoa beans nicely.

My feathers felt cool.

She stuck owl cookies.

Maybe some berries?

She sealed 'em tight.

Just watch.

She laid them cooling.

Four nights.

Finally sleepy old owl.

One bite.

Everything.

That's why I'm coming every Saturday.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
